untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental value estimation ('Fundamental value estimate derived from multiple independent analyses', 'Information source confidence score ≥ 0.75', 'required_analysis_sources: 3'), which cannot be derived from technical price/volume indicators alone. This is a discretionary, fundamental analysis-based signal that requires external valuation models and confidence scoring not available in the technical indicator set.
translation_notes: The core logic is context-dependent (buy undervalued, sell overvalued), but operationalizing 'fundamental value' requires: (1) external valuation models not available in technical indicators, (2) confidence scoring from multiple independent analyses, (3) subjective judgment of fundamental worth. The 15% discount/premium thresholds are conceptually translatable but lack the foundational 'fundamental value' reference point. Recommendation: Implement this signal using an external fundamental value module or discretionary manual entry based on qualitative analysis, then use technical exits (5% convergence, 90-day hold) for position management.
